reviews.review_text: Nice park located on the beach with in walking distance to Bowls Club, Good tracks to go for a bike ride
Great place, old school , we definitely would have stayed longer if we weren’t committed elsewhere
The beach views are simply the best, great staff and facilities are very clean |Great local services - bowls club, bakery and servo |Thanks to the team

This is our ‘goto’ place to get away from home and work! We love that it is a quiet park, and not usually too many kids around. The park is well kept and the managers are wonderful and do a great job. We also like that the park is not too large and in a small town, so you don’t feel like you’re just in another city. Ammenities are showing their age, but are always clean and well kept. We have camped here many times, and will definitely be back again!

We would like to thank Keegan & Kylie so much for the overall experience we had this year at Moore Park Beach Holiday Park. They both worked tirelessly to accomodate everyone & to keep the park running & looking the best possible in every way. We go to this park every year with friends and we were extremely impressed at how tidy, clean and well kept it was this year in particular. There was always a smiling face both in the office and outside. Well done Keegan & Kylie, it’s a credit to you both. Hopefully we will all see you and your wonderful community again next year. Thank you for making our stay enjoyable 😊

Caravan sites right on the beach front, both powered and unpowered, drinking water available at power outlets. New footpath on beach front is wonderdul and easy to ride to.store or kilometres northward. Toilets and showers clean and hygienic, sites suitable for large vans, tents and camper trailers.
Management are wonderdul, they team up together and make checking in seamless and pleasant.
A wonderdul location and superb staff.
Absolutely top spot, we love staying here and highly recommend it. Well maintained, clean amenities, Keegan and Kylie both very friendly and helpful. Looking forward to our next visit ⭐️ ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️🏖️❤️

Very relaxing right on the beach.|I am new to the caravan world and unsure at times. Managers Keegan & Kylie always made themselves available to help if needed.|Speaking with others in the park I know many felt the same way.|Shops close by and the little pink house was amazing.|Amenities were spotless.|I feel very fortunate that I do not live too far away to enjoy this beautiful part of the world.|Thank you Keegan and Kylie for making my visit so enjoyable.|I will be back.|Debbie

Nice Park. Shame the visitors didn't teach there children to not walk through othere peoples sites. Bit a free for all with kids rules. No manners Not much peace and quiet No Moore Park Beach for us.
.
We camp non powered and always have a lovely stay here. Managers are always friendly and accomodating.
A great spot great beach, facilities close to tavern, coffee shop or van if your looking for a break from camp coffee. Amenities are clean, park well kept and staff extremely friendly and helpful.
The location is perfect - away from huddle and bustle - enough infrastructure there to not need to travel from area for just a relaxing time

The cabin was adequate for our stay , it was clean , Toni was very helpful and offered to remake the bed when I needed a clean sheet , and clean towels were provided . The park was kept very clean and tidy and bins emptied every day . When we went to use barbecue David cleaned it for us and said he would clean it after , we did give it a bit of a clean . Hopefully we will be back in June/July in our caravan - thank you 😎

Beautiful location on the beach, and very quiet. Unlike a lot of parks these days, the other guests keep their dogs barking under control. This might seem an insignificant thing, but it’s getting very prevalent these days. Hopefully Moore park can stay like this. |Everything is also clean and its great price for such a lovely area is astounding. |As for the service, they went above and beyond to secure me a site over this busy period up to and including Easter.|If you are coming to Bundaberg, go the extra distance and stay out at this park.

Keegan and his partner were lovely, very friendly to our dog Rocco. So welcoming and accomodating.
The park was very clean and well kept and we enjoyed our week stay and look forward to returning one day :)

I booked in for an impromptu one night stay only on a powered van site. Kylie and Keegan run a neat clean and very friendly set up. They are both so friendly and helpful, I was bowled over as nothing was a trouble for them.
The site is right on the beach front, next to a brand new Surf Club and lovely Bob Neilsen Park which is great for kids.
The amenities are basic but clean and serviceable. And it’s pet friendly, but check their pet instructions before you book to make sure you can comply with vaccinations etc.
Will I revisit?? You bet! This is a heaven on a stick great little spot to chill away and relax. And the hamlet of Moore Beach has lots of little attractions and places to enjoy and eat…
Reception very friendly people good and clean love the fact of taking our furr baby with will definitely keep in touch 🙏
Great place to stay with most services around you and a beautiful beach you can swim in. You may even see a Turtle making it way up to the beach to lay its eggs.
Lovely friendly staff, clean facilities.  Beachfront location perfect
Amazing Holiday Park, clean amenities and great kitchen/BBQ facilities, pool, right on the beach. Great atmosphere and very friendly and helpful staff 👍
Amazing

Beachfront holiday park with tent, cabin and powered/ unpowered sites. Dog friendly (apart from the cabins I believe) and very accommodating staff. Although it was a short stay it was a great little spot with clean facilities (shower, toilets, washing and drying facilities)
Great location excellent park

The location was perfect, right on the beachfront.  The staff were amazing, so friendly and helpful.  The park was very clean and tidy and the sites were a decent size.  It wasn't too busy when we went which was even better.  We will be back.
Great little caravan park hidden gem

We had no booking, so after leaving a message we just showed up. We were greeted with a warm smile and friendly staff. They found us a caravan spot near the beach. Great location, quiet and we love our visit. The sound of the waves crashing on the beach is very relaxing. Very spacious and not cramped in, the caravans are spaced out. The office isn’t open at regular hours, but that wasn’t a problem once we were checked in. You need to leave a message or send an email to book. Good value, very clean. The toilets and showers were clean and tidy. There’s plenty of toilet and showers available in the bathroom. We absolutely loved our stay, walks along the beach and our neighbour were lovely.
Really nice caravan Park,  we stayed two days,my husband said if they had a boat ramp we could have stayed a week.
Great place! nice and quiet the amenities are clean and well maintained. Right on the beach and dog friendly. Management is very helpful and friendly. R & J

A very old amenity block and not clean!! Spacious park and dogs are allowed to bark...not happy as there should be an area for dogs...grounds are not kept and bins are not cleaned and stink. Very windy at this park!

Wow what a great place to kick back enjoy the beach the couple that run the park are absolutely awesome people sooo friendly and they keep the park in pristine condition pet friendly everything about this place is amazing third time here and will keep coming back

We are family with 2 adults and 2 kids.
Floor wasn’t swept can see the dirt at the floor when you walked in. the door has problems to open (not easy as normal)
There wasn’t enough space for cooking area.
Dishes liquid mix with water and only 1/3 bottles full…
The stove (right side) wasn’t working all the time(over heat)!
Shower room , shower gels dispenser sit in there but no much gels left!
Once open the shower door then water will turn off! You have to get in first then turn on the water!
Good view , near the beach and parks were near by. Staff were so friendly!
Great caravan park, large roads, huge sites, right on beach, dog park 2 min across from park...20ks in from Bundaberg but very serine and worth the trip if you like the quiet.. IGA and pub 10min away

Loved this park had 2 weeks here our site was great one site back from the beach only gripe in the laundry it states not to was pet bedding ok that’s fine    But apparently staff can was bacteria ridden mop heads used for the amenities surely you could have a machine somewhere located around the office / house area bit of double standards  I was not the only one who saw this as you left them out on the ironing board in full view 🤔
In caravan lovely beach side sites peace and quiet
What a great park the Managers Corrina & Karl are an asset to this park. Very welcoming and helpful lovely people 😊 In my opinion it’s people like them who make the park what it is today 😎
Had an ocean front site magnificent view very relaxing great sunrise
Loved it. Beach frontage. Peaceful
Excellant spot. Corrina was extremely helpful when checking in. Highly recommend!

First timers. Very impressed that we are coming back next year for a month. Our Chihuahua just loved the beach. Awesome fish on Friday nights. Great little craft shop and shopping 5 minutes away.
Put it on your bucket list  as it is one of the  most friendly parks.cheers
Carole. Norm and Missy
Great ocean view clean and tidy. Friendly staff. We stayed here for our anniversary. Will be coming again to bring kids next time.

Fabulous ocean views. Great managers & staff. Nothing was too much trouble. Sites are well looked after. Amenities although older were spotless with just the best showers. Easy walk to the shops. The only down side was that there was no designated dog area. We will certainly be back again.

Older style caravan park. Good size sites as close as you can get to the beach. Office doesn't seem to be staffed by regular hours but that's okay. Amenities a little tired but clean as. Only stayed one night but will be back next year for a longer stay.

Have travelled Australia and haven't been treated this well anywhere. I can't recommend this place more highly. Always updating the Motel.  The owners are the most friendly and hard working that I have met. Thanks Jan ( yarn ) and Sally. Sorry Peppy (dog) they wouldn't let me feed you.
We're loving our stay here, warm and sunny, managers are happy and helpful.  We will come back for another relaxing wonderful holiday 😎

I don't know if I want to be completely honest.. I feel like I should lie and say this place is horrible... only because we loved it so much we don't want it to get over populated 🤣 no honestly was not what we were expecting, and it over exceeded our expectations. The beach was beautiful! The lady behind reception was nice and helpful. Everyone in the park was super friendly! We would have extended our stay but was booked out. But we will come back again. Not being rude was nice not to have kids running around the park too.. the park was nice and quiet.
Easy transaction with the staff. Slab sites right on the beach.  Fair priced. Clean. Beautiful beach view. Good local shops. All in all happy

We had a wonderful time during our two week stay at Moore park caravan park 😀Friendly staff and friendly people are around. The amenities are very clean and the atmosphere is magnificent, peaceful and relaxed with the soothing sound of the ocean.We will certainly be back next year 😀 Best regards from Jenny & Selwyn and our furry companion Max 🐈‍⬛
Love it, great spot right on the beach. Amenities are very clean and tidy. Will definitely be returning!

The best park with beach front access. Sunsets are stunning. Park facities are dated, but everything works, and cleaned. Sites are flat  Short walk to bowls club, short drive to IGA. Terrific spot to unwind. Staff are friendly.
Friendly staff, reasonably priced, location  on the beach, quiet, bowls club across the road
The park was fantastic service fantastic great spot
Beachbeauty
We caravaned in this location.  The park was always clean and well kept. Good facilities. Right on the patroled beach. Shops nearby for everything you need.

Always a wonderful stay here the managers are so accomodating and friendly. Very relaxing. Such a good find.
See you next year.
Dog friendly.

This is a favourite place for me. So close to the beach, a friendly, quiet community that hasn't been overrun by tourists. We stayed in our caravan.  Facilities  are a little dated, but they are maintained and clean. Dogs are welcome if fully vaccinated. Plan on retirement at Moore Park Beach in the near future,  just looking for the perfect property.

What hidden gem of a park.
Karl & Corrina are just wonderful managers friendly and caring.
The park and amenities are spotless and the location is wonderful. If you are that precious and can find fault with the park maybe caravanning is not for you.
Got the beach side slot. Pretty good spot. The amenities were clean and great pressure on the hot water. Bowls club across the road is a little ripper $5 schooners 💪💪
Great stay. The owners are so lovely and helpful. The pool was great. Good location. Very clean rooms.

Great little park right on the beach. Good sized sites and friendly. Old but perfectly clean and serviceable. There was a sausage sizzle one night and a singer, gold coin donation. A chilled evening. Woodfired Pizza van, Burger van and coffee van regular visitors. There's even a small vege garden that campers can access. Enjoyed our stay, thanks.

Great old school caravan park with old school beach views! We have come here many times and it’s even better now with Karl & Corrina running the park. Very impressed with the effort they made with Santa & Mrs Claws, the kids loved it and was a highlight. Nothing beats old fashioned hospitality. Very clean facilities and love the new gardens, these guys care about their park!
We stayed in our motorhome, beautiful clean and tidy. Friendly staff

A great holiday park to stay for a quiet and relaxing break. Sites are well spaced and the park is well maintained. The amenities are older style but clean. We spent 10 days at the park . Would definitely recommend this as a must experience right on the beautiful beach.

We stayed over the new year period, we did enjoy our time here with walking distance to the beach. Having 3 parks close by for kids, skate park and pool, the toilets were always clean, showers would have sand in them but it's a caravan park on the beach it expected.
Only thing we didn't like was that we are a family of 5 and only one amenities key. We managed but was painful 😂🤦.
Really hope the surf club can reopens as I think meals or even afternoon drinks could be great there. IGA was just a 5 min drive as well as the bottle shop.
Coffee lady came everyday we were there and partner said they were great coffees.
Overall we enjoyed our stay and will be back.
Great spot with the RV backed close to the beach to watch the morning sunrise.
Tidy park right on the beach. Friendly staff and easy check in. Walking and biking paths with dog off leash park across the road. Will definitely be back.

A big thank you to Moore Park Beach, manages Karl and his beautiful wife Corrina they go above and beyond,keep everyone happy and informed Amenities are all ways clean and a lovely morning tea cheers guys Rob and trish

We stayed at this wonderful beachside campsite without a booking and were lucky enough to get an unpowered site right next to the beach! The atmosphere was peaceful and quiet, perfect for a relaxing getaway. The staff were super friendly and welcoming, making us feel right at home from the start. There's also a cute café nearby, run by some amazing ladies, where we enjoyed great coffee and snacks. If you're looking for a chill, serene spot with easy beach access and a friendly vibe, this place is perfect!

Great little quiet place to camp. A very friendly smaller caravan park. The staff are very friendly and helpful. The grounds are well looked after. Both Amenities blocks are kept very clean. We have stayed here on several occasions and always find the park quiet and inviting. There is a great beachfront where the swimming is great with a surf lifesaving club next door where the beach is patrolled during school holidays and weekends. There is also a small swimming pool for those not wanting to go in the ocean. There is also a covered BBQ area with tables and a sink with water for cleanup afterwards. There is a great boardwalk along the waterfront for lovely walks as well.
Great place to stay very close to the beach
Great place for a holiday great staff and caravan  sites

Great little spot near beach to sit back & relax. Only 20km to Bundeburg where there is everything you need .  Facilities old but clean & even has a pool.   Only complaint I had is with Rubbish bins being dragged around every day before 8am,...would be easier to cope if that was after 9 am.

A good spot for a few nights, just don't fall in the manky  duck pond. Council needs to have running water through the pond and get rid of some of the ducks never seen that many in a populated area before.
What a hidden gem. Close to everything you need. Fall asleep after a big day exploring to the sound of the surf breaking right out your window.

Had to cancel our booking which we did with 10 days notice and we still lost our deposit. Contacted Bundy Council and confirmed this was policy to cover administration fees! Bit disappointing considering any other park we’ve booked in only requires 24hrs notice. Just FYI if you’re considering booking ahead.
Good facilities but the weather was terrible.

Been to Moore Park Beach numbers of times from tents to caravans Its about 16km to Bundaberg CBD.
Park is usually busy in Winter, nice place, staff good.Beaches Good.
Recommended.
Great location to have a getaway from the normal lifestyle that most of us have very relaxing.

We stayed in an unpowered site for 5 nights. The sites were pretty sandy/dirty but we’re informal enough that we found some grass. Beautiful beach, lovely park right next to our site. A quiet spot on the coast, close to Bundaberg. The amenities were clean, the camp kitchen could do with a stove but otherwise good for cooking and washing up. We were able to watch the  Olympics on the TV each evening which was great. Lots of barbecue areas around the park. The only downside was a lack of lighting which made it difficult getting to and from the toilets at night. The managers were very helpful and friendly.

Great place
Lots of mice there !! Mouse bones everywhere at back of beach
Good shops walking tracks around
Good beach for kids
Dogs not allowed on beach although I did see lots of dogs on leash
Good sites roomy enough
Laundry only has 2 machines be prepared to line up lots of older people fussing around lining up arguing over who had it next lol
Good supermarket and great bottle shop !!
Great spot on the beach.
Great caravan park. Good people who run the park. Old but very clean amenities. Right next to a huge long beach. Dogs are welcome. Good cycle path. Close to shops good walk to the tavern
Lovely peaceful park.

A lovely place to rest and unwind. We had a place right near the beach. Grassed. Good price, clean amenities, close to food outlets. Plenty to see. Our 2 Fur Babies loved it too.
We'll be coming back.

What a lovely place to stay, the beach is right there and you wake up with the sound of waves. The staff are really friendly, the facilities are clean and we would love to come back!

The other campers here are also so friendly, and there is a lovely atmosphere around the park.

Stayed for approx 3 weeks. Listening to the ocean at night and seeing dolphins on our daily walks along the shore.   Amenties block was very clean, hot showers were always welcome at the end of the day. The park was very quiet,  friendly and very tidy. A credit to the managers. Laundry room was a bonus.
Camped in June lovely spot at the beach well kept good facilities nice and quiet.

At the start of May, my family and I made our way up to Moore Park Beach Holiday Park for a little mid-year vacay. We really enjoyed our whole time/ experience in the area and at the park. We remained local as we just wanted to have a care-free and low maintenance holiday. Something that was very easily achieved as the park and its calming ambiance and all the travelling inhabitants were very relaxed and friendly. Management has kept all shared amenities very clean and well presented. The gardens and shared green spaces have been kept in lavish fashion, management definitely have an eye for detail. The kiosk has plenty of snacks and odd sod things to buy, score! (There’s plenty in there you may need than you realise). Check in and check out was very seamless, the team are well experienced. Got some advice on best fishing spots from one of the managers, it’s a trade secret, you’ll have to ask him yourself. 🤫 If you’re not sure what to do in the area, there is an itinerary booklet and information sheet in each cabin. 10/10. We will be back. Thank you Karl & Corrina for a wonderful holidaying experience.

Can’t wait to come back! Had an awesome time at Moore Park Beach and hope to one day come back! Very helpful owners, Karl was able to help us out with the best fishing spots and Corrina was so nice, my partner, family and I felt more then welcomed. The owners had brought nibblies for the family to share and it was an absolute treat! Would recommend to anyone and will definitely be back.

Very welcoming staff. Clearly marked sites. Aging but very clean amenities. Some drainage works are being done so less sites are available at present. The park is located next to the beach. The sound of the waves is very calming. A nearby pathway takes you all the way to the shopping area.
Very clean and staff great
Such a beautiful caravan park, amenities are always clean and smells so gd. So close to beach absolutely love it.
A lovely very clean park. New managers very friendly and have done a great job after the last people. Highly recommended.

This lovely park right on the beachfront just north of Bundaberg is our favourite. We have stayed at all the parks in Bundy over the years. The Managers Corrina & Karl are very obliging, friendly & professional. This was our first stay (3 nights). We'll certainly be regulars for sure. 🤠🏊🏌️🐟🎣

Very quiet beachfront camp. Lots of facilities around including walkways, skate park, dog off leash park and bowls club. Facilities are not modern but are clean and have excellent hot water. There is a pool onsite that looks like it needs a clean (could just be the time we came through). Plus only short drive into Bundaberg.
Excellent camping spots, grassy areas, great sea view, clean and excellent amenities, great service. We will definitely be returning.

This is a beautiful caravan park with access right onto the beach and beside a beautiful huge pond with ducks etc. However the 3 nights we stayed were awful in the fact that the amenities were not cleaned once and were revolting. The bins were overflowing swarming with flies. Some kid pooped in the pool and the caretaker couldn't be contacted so another visitor scooped it out, found chlorine and text the caretaker who didn't appear to do anything even such as putting a sign up. Alot of the children staying there caught tummy bugs including our child. The lady in reception was very nice and helpful though and a beautiful area like I said.

Old school van park. Has a small pool, amenities are aging but staff are friendly. We visited during December just as the coral spawning began so, beach was looking dirty and frothy. Its not always like that though. Town holds xmas carols and market finishing with a fire works display, right next to the park.
Temp hosts were perfectly hospitable,  parked my van 4 me lol im a newby. Location Location,  beach front, not much about but enough for a quiet break. Family friendly ❤️ 💙 💕
Right on the beach. Great place to have that beach getaway.
Yapping dogs spoilt our stay. Owners could be more respectful or Park will not allow dogs.

previous managers very good new manager unfriendly and unhelpful. booked the site we had for the last 4 years 10 weeks in advance arrived and he had given it to someone else even though there were 47 other vacant sites. They did not turn up for 6 days after we arrived. Amenity block was not cleaned for 5 days won't be going back while he's there. He's not suited to the job.
It's old.  But close to the beach and relatively quiet.  It not bad old.  Just old.
Stayed in a caravan site, amenities are clean, host was friendly

There several months in caravan.
No milk available.  Only couple of klms away.

Came here 6 years ago and really enjoyed it so came back again. It is definitely busier than we recall (same time of year) but we enjoyed our return visit for 3 nights.  If you want a beach front campsite then you'll need to book in advance. Enjoyed some nice coffee from the morning coffee truck. There is also a burger truck later in the day and pizzas on certain days but we didn't try those.   Amenities were exactly the same. Best part about this place is the great beach and that didn't disappoint. Excellent 4G reception here and no free WiFi.
Great little place to stay
Loved it all. So quiet and relaxing

Spotless amenities. Fantastic place for walking your dog as park area all around the van park. Staff very friendly. Great walking paths and a longgg beach to walk along. Shopping centre and service station just up the road. Bowls club behind park. Pink house has  cheap crafts in it and a lovely verandah to sit on which is next to the park.
Lovely, quiet spot away from the popular beaches but  right on the beach.  Staff are friendly and helpful and the park amenities are well maintained.

Stayed in the Caravan Park. My wife and I love it. Close to the bowls club. Burger and coffee carts visit most days. Can't beat a walk on the beach every day and when you want, you can get a feed at the bowls club or the local hotel.
Nice friendly caravan park in a great position right on the beach
We stayed in our own van beautiful spot.
Nice caravan park. The showers could do with a good scrub, but the rest of the location was great.

Stayed in the caravan Park up by the beach.
It was a pleasurable experience.
If you can get a beach front spot grab it. Pam at reception is lovely. Right on the bike path so take your pushies.
Awesome caravan park, right on the beach ⛱️
